summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OMOTAL TRAVAUX construction site management app. Backend APIs fully functional with role-based access control, approval workflows, and auto-transaction creation. Frontend UI working with all pages accessible, mobile interface operational for POINTEUR role.

minor_issues.issue: Gasoil sortie test incomplete - needs engin_id validation
minor_issues.impact: Test coverage incomplete for sortie creation by POINTEUR

minor_issues.issue: Engin pointage and paiement tests not fully executed
Mobile action buttons (Sortie gasoil, Pointer engins) not fully tested with form submission

passed_tests: Backend: All 6 demo users login successfully with correct credentials
Backend: Invalid login returns 401 as expected
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user with permissions list
Backend: GET /api/auth/demo-users returns 6 demo users
Backend: Role-based chantier filtering (Ali sees 3, Ayoub sees 1)
Backend: POST /api/chantiers creates chantier for SUPER_ADMIN
Backend: POST /api/chantiers returns 403 for POINTEUR (permission enforcement)
Backend: POST /api/caisse with amount < 10000 auto-validates (status=VALIDE)
Backend: POST /api/caisse with amount >= 10000 creates SOUMIS status with needs_approval=true
Backend: POST /api/caisse/{id}/status validates high payment by DIRECTEUR
Backend: POST /api/caisse returns 403 for POINTEUR (permission enforcement)
Backend: GET /api/caisse/summary returns entrees, sorties, solde, by_mode, categories
Backend: POST /api/gasoil/entrees computes total_amount correctly (litres * unit_price)
Backend: GET /api/gasoil/stock returns stock_theorique (entrees - sorties)
Backend: POST /api/personnel/employees creates employee successfully
Backend: POST /api/personnel/pointage computes salaire_du correctly based on remuneration_type JOUR
Backend: POST /api/personnel/avances creates avance AND auto-creates transaction in caisse
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/global returns kpis, chantier_cards, categories
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/chantier/{id} returns chantier overview with all modules
Backend: GET /api/validations/pending returns aggregated SOUMIS items
Backend: GET /api/alertes generates and returns alerts
Backend: GET /api/excel/export/transactions returns xlsx blob
Backend: GET /api/excel/export/gasoil returns xlsx with sheets
Frontend: Login page renders with demo users and quick-select buttons
Frontend: Login as Ali (SUPER_ADMIN) redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Login as Ayoub (POINTEUR) redirects to /mobile/accueil
Frontend: Global Dashboard displays KPIs (chantiers actifs, dépenses, stock gasoil, alertes)
Frontend: Global Dashboard shows 4 chantier cards with status and metrics
Frontend: Chantiers page lists chantiers with 'Nouveau chantier' button
Frontend: Caisse page shows summary KPIs and 'Nouvelle transaction' button
Frontend: Gasoil page shows stock KPI and tabs (Sorties, Entrées, Engins)
Frontend: Personnel page loads with pointage interface
Frontend: Engins page loads with pointage interface
Frontend: Validations page shows pending items
Frontend: Alertes page displays alerts with filtering
Frontend: Excel Import/Export page accessible with import/export functionality
Frontend: Admin page lists all 6 users with roles and chantier assignments
Frontend: Mobile home page shows chantier selector and 2 action buttons
Frontend: Mobile gasoil sortie form accessible
Frontend: Mobile engins pointage page accessible
Frontend: Logout and re-login working correctly
Frontend: Navigation between all pages working smoothly
